allow: Bash(git commit -m 'Fix: Specify exact pnpm version in GitHub Actions to match project version *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Fix: Correct route protection middleware to match actual URL paths *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Fix: Move middleware.ts to project root for proper Next.js edge execution *)
Bash(sed -i 's/setValue\("tipo", value as any\)/setValue\("tipo", value as "honorario_fixo" | "honorario_variavel" | "custas" | "outro"\)/g' components/admin/CaseCostForm.tsx)
Bash(sed -i 's/setValue\("fase", value as any\)/setValue\("fase", value as "conhecimento" | "recurso" | "execucao" | "encerrado"\)/g' components/admin/CaseForm.tsx)
Bash(sed -i 's/setValue\("status", value as any\)/setValue\("status", value as "em_andamento" | "resolvido" | "suspenso"\)/g' components/admin/CaseForm.tsx)
Bash(sed -i 's/setValue\("role", value as any\)/setValue\("role", value as "admin" | "controller" | "advogado" | "cliente"\)/g' components/admin/UserForm.tsx)
Bash(git commit --allow-empty -m 'ci: trigger redeploy from latest commit *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Fix login redirect: use full page reload to trigger middleware session check *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Rewrite login with Server Action for proper SSR cookie handling *)
